## Introduction

Announced Nov 1, 2025: Neudesic introduced Digital Workforce Management on Azure AI Foundry to govern and scale enterprise AI agents.

Neudesic, an IBM company, launched a Digital Workforce Management platform built on Microsoft Azure AI Foundry. It lets enterprises operate governed fleets of AI agents-autonomous or assistive-across departments and processes. Think scheduling, claims, procurement, and knowledge ops with end-to-end observability, policy, and audit. The pitch: move beyond isolated pilots to managed, compliant AI 'workforces' that plug into existing systems. If it delivers, the near-term impact is measurable: cycle times down, manual touches reduced, and better traceability for risk teams. It's a pragmatic step toward agentic transformation, aligned to how enterprises actually adopt new tech-securely, and in phases.
